patterns.name: keyword.control.exception.richtext
patterns.match: \b([Bb]ut|[Hh]owever|[Yy]et|[Aa]lthough|[Tt]hough|[Ww]hile|[Nn]evertheless|[Nn]onetheless|[Oo]n the other hand|[Ii]n contrast|[Cc]onversely)\b|但是|然而|却|不过|虽然|尽管|相反|反之

patterns.name: keyword.other.richtext
patterns.match: \b([Mm]oreover|[Ff]urthermore|[Aa]dditionally|[Aa]lso|[Bb]esides|[Ii]n addition|[Ww]hat's more|[Ll]ikewise|[Ss]imilarly)\b|此外|并且|而且|同时|另外|再者|同样|类似地

patterns.name: keyword.control.flow.richtext
patterns.match: \b([Ii]n conclusion|[Ii]n summary|[Oo]verall|[Tt]o sum up|[Ii]n short|[Aa]ll in all)\b|总之|综上|总体来看|总而言之|简而言之

patterns.name: comment.line.richtext
patterns.match: \b([Ff]or example|[Ff]or instance|[Ss]uch as|[Nn]amely|[Ii]ncluding)\b|例如|比如|诸如|包括|譬如

patterns.name: constant.numeric.richtext
patterns.match: \b([Ff]irst(ly)?|[Ss]econd(ly)?|[Tt]hird(ly)?|[Nn]ext|[Tt]hen|[Ff]inally|[Ll]astly|[Ii]nitially|[Tt]o begin with|[Aa]fter that|[Ii]n the end)\b|首先|其次|第一|第二|第三|然后|接着|再次|最后|终于

patterns.name: constant.numeric.richtext
patterns.match: \b\d+(\.\d+)?%?\b|[一二三四五六七八九十百千万]+[个条项点]?
